file_name: SPIENERGYCO,LTD_07_10_2014-EX-10-Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao of~1.txt

perturbation.original_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, in the principle of equality, mutual benefits, win-win cooperation and solid progress, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project: I. Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B, and will provide the most preferential policies and all- round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and actively coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress.
perturbation.changed_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, in the principle of equality, mutual benefits, win-win cooperation and solid progress, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project: I. Party A will endeavor to support the project construction and development of Party B, and will seek to provide the most preferential policies and all-round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and will, to the extent reasonably possible, coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress.
perturbation.explanation: The original text uses definitive language, stating Party A 'supports and guarantees' the project and 'will provide' preferential policies and services. The modified text uses less certain language such as 'endeavor to support,' 'seek to provide,' and 'to the extent reasonably possible' coordinate. This creates an in-text contradiction with the later sections, where specific obligations and expectations for Party A are defined, creating ambiguity about the enforceability of those expectations. This change introduces uncertainty as to the level of commitment Party A has to the project.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Party B will register a foreign-funded company in Fenyi County before implementing the project; Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction.
perturbation.justification: The original text contained a guarantee from Party A to Party B to offer preferential policies. The changed text modifies this guarantee to an endeavor, creating an in-text contradiction. The contradicted text states "Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction." The change to 'endeavor to support' means that there is no longer a strict guarantee and Party A is no longer obliged to provide the specific preferential policies outlined, thus making it contradictory.

perturbation.original_text: As required by Party B building PV grid-connected power station project, Party A accepts the Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County signed by Party B and Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County, and actively coordinates Yangqiao Town to perform relevant responsibilities.
perturbation.changed_text: As potentially required by Party B building PV grid-connected power station project, Party A acknowledges the Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County signed by Party B and Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County, and may coordinate with Yangqiao Town to perform some of their responsibilities.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states Party A 'accepts' the agreement and 'actively coordinates' Yangqiao Town. The modified version replaces 'accepts' with 'acknowledges' and 'actively coordinates' with 'may coordinate', creating uncertainty about Party A's commitment to the agreement between Party B and Yangqiao Town and to actively facilitating the performance of responsibilities. This contradicts with earlier sections where solid progress was expected, creating uncertainty in contract enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, in the principle of equality, mutual benefits, win-win cooperation and solid progress, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project: I. Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B, and will provide the most preferential policies and all- round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and actively coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress.
perturbation.justification: The original text created a clear obligation for Party A to 'accept' and 'actively coordinate.' The changed text weakens this commitment, introducing uncertainty by using 'acknowledges' and 'may coordinate.' This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which emphasizes 'solid progress' and Party A's commitment to 'support and guarantee the project' and 'actively coordinate' to accelerate progress. The change creates a conflict, as Party A's reduced commitment undermines the expectation of active support and solid progress, thereby creating ambiguity and potential unenforceability, qualifying as an 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Party B promises that land nature will not be changed for building large-scale PV grid-connected power generation project in the plot; comprehensive development will be carried out according to relevant national stipulations, such commercial crops will be interplanted as agriculture and forestry as well as medicinal materials; local employees will enjoy the priority to be employed; local building materials will be adopted and relevant expenses will be paid on schedule.
perturbation.changed_text: Party B intends to maintain the existing land nature while building the large-scale PV grid-connected power generation project; comprehensive development will be considered in accordance with relevant national stipulations, with commercial crops possibly being interplanted as agriculture and forestry as well as medicinal materials; local employees will be considered for employment; local building materials will be considered and relevant expenses will be attempted to be paid on schedule.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that 'Party B promises that land nature will not be changed,' and actions 'will be carried out,' 'will enjoy,' 'will be adopted,' and 'will be paid.' The modified text weakens these obligations by using 'intends to maintain,' 'will be considered,' 'possibly being interplanted,' 'considered for employment,' 'considered,' and 'attempted to be paid.' This creates a contradiction between these weakened promises and the expectations of win-win cooperation and solid progress mentioned earlier, as the enforceability of Party B's commitments is now questionable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the principle of win-win cooperation, based on 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Yangqiao Town, Party B will vigorously promote the application of PV products, improve local energy-saving and emission reduction benefits, increase local fiscal levy, enhance villagers' income and increase villagers' employment.
perturbation.justification: The original text provides a series of firm commitments from Party B. The changed text replaces these firm commitments with weaker, conditional statements. This directly contradicts the 'win-win cooperation' principle, as the enforceability and reliability of Party B's contributions are significantly reduced, creating a strong inconsistency in the obligations. This inconsistency makes the 'increase local fiscal levy, enhance villagers' income and increase villagers' employment' less assured.
